review_comment: Isn't this default value already handled by the caller using `GetParameterOrDefault()`?
We need to set a default for external callers of this method

Not sure I follow how this works, are the logs at 251 and 258 now outdated?
`processedFile` is the combination of `_processedFilesDirectory.FullName` and `destinationDirectory.Name`?
`destinationDirectory.Name` gets the `transactions` or `intentions` part of the path, so that we know where to load up the existing files from.
thanks for the updated docs - The log at 252 seems to supposed that the `finalFile` is the same as the `processedFile` which isn't the case anymore?

I believe it makes sense to keep the logs as-is so that we can differentiate whether we're writing to a new file, or an existing file. Maybe some rewording of that log message would be ideal for further clarity.
